response.justification: Bogdan has strong breadth across ~17 years of software engineering and touches AI tooling in his current role, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, demonstrated expertise in cloud and AI platforms — someone who advises enterprise customers and shapes product direction. His AI involvement is surface-level and very recent (MCP tooling since April 2025), with no evidence of recognized AI expertise, enterprise advisory work, or cloud platform strategy at the scale this role requires.
strengths: 17+ years of professional software experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — meets the seniority floor
Active exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows in current role, showing genuine interest in the space
Founder of GISCollective and history of open-source work demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
concerns: AI expertise is nascent and narrow — recent MCP tooling work does not constitute the recognized, director-level AI platform leadership the role requires
No cloud platform strategy experience and no evidence of advising enterprise or strategic customers on AI/cloud adoption
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and no published research, patents, or externally recognized contributions to AI

key_factors.factor: No enterprise advisory or strategic customer experience
Long, broad engineering career meets experience floor
